headline: Guggenheim Cuts Chipotle Price Target as Margin Pressure Mounts: Is the Recovery Story Stalling?
summary: Guggenheim trimmed its price target on Chipotle Mexican Grill (NYSE:CMG) to $35 from $36 on Friday, keeping a Neutral rating as margin pressure forces earnings estimate cuts. Analyst Gregory Francfort lowered both 2026 and 2027 earnings per share (EPS) estimates by about 3%, signaling that profitability headwinds may outlast any near-term traffic recovery. For prudent ... Guggenheim Cuts Chipotle Price Target as Margin Pressure Mounts: Is the Recovery Story Stalling?

headline: Morgan Stanley resets Chipotle stock forecast after earnings
summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill has spent years convincing investors that it can raise prices, open restaurants, and keep customers coming back, but Wall Street is now asking a harder question about how much growth the fast-casual chain can still deliver in a tougher consumer backdrop. headline: Labor market is the 'linchpin' holding US consumer spending up
summary: After hearing from a host of companies and top executives this week — including Brinker International (EAT), Starbucks (SBUX), and SoFi Technologies (SOFI) — what's the general consensus on the US economy as the American consumer continues to spend? Yahoo Finance Executive Editor Brian Sozzi is joined by Senior Reporters Brooke DiPalma and Ines Ferré and Sevens Report Research founder Tom Essaye examine several key factors, from elevated gas prices (RB=F) and the labor market to same-store sales figures and restaurant menu offerings.
